title: pelargonium collae
intro: Pelargonium collae, a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, is a succulent shrub native to the southwestern parts of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium collae include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu, such as congestion and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium collae are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and aid in the relief of respiratory issues.
